headline: Dollar General sees shift in how customers are spending
summary: When the economy struggles, many people don't give up on things like luxury purchases and eating. Instead, they trade down to something that costs less. "If you look at incomes under $100,000, we're actually doing quite well there, which suggests that we're getting some benefit from trade down, ...
